projects.title: Design Leadership Network
projects.description: Website for a community platform connecting design leaders worldwide.
projects.summary: Website design for a community platform connecting design leaders worldwide.
projects.body:
## Overview

Design Leadership Network is a community platform for senior design leaders to connect, share knowledge, and grow. The project required a website that reflected the quality and credibility of its membership.

## Challenge

The platform needed to communicate trust and exclusivity while remaining approachable. The design had to appeal to senior decision-makers without feeling corporate or cold.

## Solution

We developed a clean, editorial-style design system — strong typography, generous whitespace, and a restrained colour palette that let the community and content take centre stage.

## Results

The new site launched to positive reception from the membership community. Engagement with the platform increased and sign-up conversions improved significantly.

projects.title: Emma
projects.description: Website redesign for a sleep technology brand.
projects.summary: Website redesign for Emma — a global sleep technology brand bringing better sleep to millions.
projects.body:
## Overview

Emma is one of the world's leading sleep technology brands, selling mattresses, pillows, and sleep accessories across multiple markets. The project involved a redesign of key landing pages to improve conversion and brand consistency.

## Challenge

With a wide product range and diverse global audience, the site needed to feel cohesive across markets while allowing for localisation. Performance and conversion were critical metrics.

## Solution

We focused on a modular component system — flexible enough for localisation teams to adapt, consistent enough to maintain brand quality across regions. Hero sections, product showcases, and trust builders were reworked to guide users more clearly toward purchase.

## Results

The redesigned pages showed measurable improvement in engagement and conversion rates compared to previous versions.

projects.title: Spherex
projects.description: Website for a content compliance and localisation technology platform.
projects.summary: Website design for Spherex — a platform that automates content compliance and localisation for global media.
projects.body:
## Overview

Spherex is a technology platform that helps media companies automate content compliance and cultural localisation. The project was a full website redesign to better communicate their complex technical offering to enterprise buyers.

## Challenge

The core challenge was simplifying a highly technical product without dumbing it down. Enterprise buyers needed to quickly understand what Spherex does, why it matters, and why they should trust it.

## Solution

We built the site around clear use cases and outcomes rather than features. Visual storytelling, structured page hierarchy, and a confident, minimal design language helped communicate authority and reliability.

## Results

The new site improved clarity of messaging significantly. Sales reported that prospects came into conversations better informed about the product.

projects.title: Jiminny
projects.description: Website redesign for a conversation intelligence platform for sales teams.
projects.summary: Website redesign for Jiminny — a conversation intelligence platform that helps sales teams improve performance.
projects.body:
## Overview

Jiminny is a conversation intelligence platform that records, transcribes, and analyses sales calls to help teams coach better and close more. The project was a full website redesign to sharpen positioning and drive demo sign-ups.

## Challenge

The existing site was busy and unfocused. Key messages were buried and the user journey toward booking a demo was unclear. The brand also needed refreshing to better reflect Jiminny's growth and ambition.

## Solution

We simplified the information architecture, tightened the messaging, and redesigned the visual system from the ground up — introducing a cleaner layout language and stronger hierarchy throughout.

## Results

The new site launched with a stronger conversion path and a more confident brand presence. Demo request submissions increased following the launch.

projects.title: Phase Six Online
projects.description: Website for a vocabulary learning platform used by millions of students.
projects.summary: Website design for Phase Six Online — a vocabulary learning platform used by millions of students across Europe.
projects.body:
## Overview

Phase Six is one of Europe's leading vocabulary learning platforms, used by millions of students and teachers. The project was a website redesign focused on communicating the platform's value to both schools and individual learners.

## Challenge

The platform serves two distinct audiences — institutions and individual users — with different needs, motivations, and decision journeys. The site needed to serve both without feeling fragmented.

## Solution

We structured the site around clear audience paths with shared but adaptable design components. The visual language was refreshed to feel contemporary and approachable while maintaining the credibility needed for institutional buyers.

## Results

The redesigned site improved clarity of audience targeting and was well received by both the client team and their user community.

projects.title: N3O
projects.description: Website for a nonprofit technology consultancy.
projects.summary: Website design for N3O — a technology consultancy specialising in digital transformation for the nonprofit sector.
projects.body:
## Overview

N3O is a technology consultancy that helps nonprofit organisations modernise their operations through tailored digital solutions. The project was a full website redesign to better reflect their expertise and attract the right clients.

## Challenge

Nonprofit-focused technology consultancies need to communicate both technical credibility and genuine mission alignment. The site needed to feel trustworthy and human — not cold and corporate.

## Solution

We built the site around clarity and warmth — structured layouts, clear service descriptions, and a visual tone that communicated both competence and care for the sector they serve.

## Results

The new site gave N3O a significantly stronger digital presence and better aligned their visual identity with the quality of their work.

projects.title: Pencil
projects.description: Website for an AI-powered creative ad generation platform.
projects.summary: Website design for Pencil — an AI platform that generates and tests creative ad content at scale.
projects.body:
## Overview

Pencil is an AI-powered platform that helps marketing teams generate, test, and optimise creative ad content at scale. The project was a website redesign to better position them in a rapidly growing market.

## Challenge

The AI creative space is crowded and fast-moving. Pencil needed a site that communicated their specific value clearly and fast — to performance marketers who have seen plenty of AI promises.

## Solution

We led with outcomes over features — showing what Pencil makes possible rather than explaining how it works. The design was energetic and direct, matching the pace of the teams it serves.

## Results

The redesigned site sharpened Pencil's positioning and improved the clarity of their core value proposition for the target audience.

projects.title: Arbitrary Execution
projects.description: Website for a cybersecurity research and advisory firm.
projects.summary: Website design for Arbitrary Execution — a specialist cybersecurity research and advisory firm.
projects.body:
## Overview

Arbitrary Execution is a specialist cybersecurity firm offering research, advisory, and offensive security services. The project was a new website to establish their presence and attract the right enterprise clients.

## Challenge

Cybersecurity is a trust-heavy category where credibility and authority matter more than almost anything else. The site needed to communicate deep expertise without being inaccessible — and feel distinct in a space full of dark, aggressive aesthetics.

## Solution

We took a more refined, editorial approach — clean layouts, precise typography, and a design language that felt authoritative and considered rather than aggressive. The content was structured to demonstrate expertise through specificity.

## Results

The site gave Arbitrary Execution a strong, distinctive presence that set them apart from typical cybersecurity firms.

projects.title: TEDx Website
projects.description: Website design for a TEDx event.
projects.summary: Website design for a TEDx event — bringing the spirit of TED to a local community audience.
projects.body:
## Overview

TEDx events bring the TED format to local communities around the world. This project was a custom website for a TEDx event, designed to generate excitement, communicate the event programme, and drive ticket sales.

## Challenge

The site needed to honour the TED brand while feeling locally rooted and event-specific. It also had to work hard commercially — clearly communicating the programme and making ticket purchase as frictionless as possible.

## Solution

We designed a bold, energetic site that led with speakers and themes, making the event feel unmissable. The structure guided visitors naturally from discovery to ticket purchase with minimal friction.

## Results

The event sold out and the organising team reported the site as a key driver of awareness and ticket conversion.

projects.title: Deepdub
projects.description: Complete website revamp for an AI-powered dubbing platform.
projects.summary: A complete website revamp for Deepdub — an AI-powered dubbing solution that localises content into any language at scale.
projects.body:
## Overview

Deepdub is an AI-powered dubbing platform that helps media companies, streaming services, and content creators localise video content into any language at scale — fast, accurately, and with natural-sounding results.

The project was a complete website revamp. The existing site was dated and didn't reflect the quality or ambition of the product. The goal was to bring the design in line with where the brand was heading — confident, modern, and built for enterprise buyers.

## What I did

Working within the Arch Web Design team, I led the visual design for the new site — from initial concepts through to final Webflow delivery.

The work included:
- Defining a refreshed visual direction: tighter typography, a cleaner layout system, and a colour palette that felt premium without being cold
- Designing all core pages: homepage, product pages, use case pages, and pricing
- Creating a component library in Figma, structured for efficient Webflow development
- Collaborating closely with the developer throughout the build to ensure everything translated cleanly from design to code

## Outcome

The new site gave Deepdub a significantly stronger first impression — one that matched the sophistication of the product it was representing.

> "I recently collaborated with Arch Web Design and was thoroughly impressed by their professionalism and the quality of their work. Their ability to deliver a high-quality, intuitive website exceeded my expectations."
>
> — Zivit Katz, VP Marketing, Deepdub

projects.title: Mode
projects.description: Website for a data analytics and business intelligence platform.
projects.summary: Website design for Mode — a data analytics platform for business intelligence teams.
projects.body:
## Overview

Mode is a data analytics platform that helps business intelligence teams explore data, build reports, and share insights. The project was a website redesign to better communicate their product value.

## Challenge

Data analytics is a competitive, crowded market. Mode needed to articulate what makes their platform different — particularly for technical audiences who are sceptical of marketing claims.

## Solution

We structured the site around specific user workflows and outcomes, showing the product in context rather than talking about it in the abstract. Design was precise and minimal — matching the expectations of technical buyers.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Cold Email
projects.description: Website for a cold email outreach platform.
projects.summary: Website design for a cold email outreach platform.
projects.body:
## Overview

A website design project for a cold email outreach tool aimed at sales teams and growth marketers.

## Challenge

The platform needed to convert sceptical visitors fast — cold email has a reputation problem, and the site needed to address objections while communicating genuine value.

## Solution

We led with results and social proof, structuring the page to handle objections proactively and make the product's benefits immediately obvious.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Hike SEO
projects.description: Website for an SEO platform designed for small businesses.
projects.summary: Website design for Hike SEO — an SEO platform built specifically for small businesses.
projects.body:
## Overview

Hike SEO is an SEO tool built for small business owners who want to improve their search visibility without needing to become SEO experts.

## Challenge

Most SEO tools feel complex and intimidating. Hike needed a site that communicated simplicity and accessibility — showing that SEO doesn't have to be scary.

## Solution

We built the site around approachability — plain language, clear steps, and a design that felt friendly and achievable rather than technical and overwhelming.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Aperios
projects.description: Website for a financial services technology company.
projects.summary: Website design for Aperios — a financial services technology company.
projects.body:
## Overview

Aperios is a financial services technology company. The project was a website to establish their digital presence and communicate their proposition to enterprise clients.

## Challenge

Financial services websites need to communicate trust, compliance, and technical capability simultaneously — without feeling cold or impersonal.

## Solution

We developed a professional, structured design with strong typographic hierarchy and a clear service architecture that made the proposition immediately understandable.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Teamclass
projects.description: Website for a corporate team-building and learning experiences platform.
projects.summary: Website design for Teamclass — a platform connecting companies with team-building and learning experiences.
projects.body:
## Overview

Teamclass connects companies with curated team-building experiences and workshops. The project was a website redesign to better serve both corporate buyers and experience providers.

## Challenge

The platform needed to inspire and reassure at the same time — helping corporate buyers discover experiences while feeling confident about the quality and logistics.

## Solution

We designed a marketplace-inspired layout that made discovery easy, with strong visual hierarchy and clear paths for both buyer types.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Uptrail
projects.description: Website for a talent acquisition and recruiting platform.
projects.summary: Website design for Uptrail — a talent acquisition platform for modern recruiting teams.
projects.body:
## Overview

Uptrail is a talent acquisition platform that helps recruiting teams manage candidates and collaborate more effectively. The project was a website redesign to sharpen their positioning.

## Challenge

The recruiting tech market is saturated. Uptrail needed to communicate what made their approach different — particularly their focus on collaboration and candidate experience.

## Solution

We built the site around the recruiter's journey, showing how Uptrail fits into existing workflows rather than asking teams to change everything.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Purple Farm Genetics
projects.description: Brand and website for an agricultural genetics company.
projects.summary: Brand identity and website design for Purple Farm Genetics — an agricultural genetics company.
projects.body:
## Overview

Purple Farm Genetics is an agricultural genetics company developing improved plant varieties. The project was a brand identity and website to establish their presence.

## Challenge

Agriculture is a traditional industry, but genetics is cutting-edge science. The brand needed to bridge both worlds — credible to farmers and scientists alike.

## Solution

We developed a brand that felt grounded and natural while communicating precision and innovation. The website followed the same principle — accessible language, clean design, strong photography.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Piiano
projects.description: Website for a data privacy vault and infrastructure company.
projects.summary: Website design for Piiano — a data privacy vault platform for engineering teams.
projects.body:
## Overview

Piiano provides a privacy vault and infrastructure tools that help engineering teams handle sensitive personal data safely and compliantly. The project was a website to communicate their developer-focused product to technical and business buyers.

## Challenge

Privacy infrastructure is a specialist product. The site needed to speak credibly to both security-focused engineers and compliance-minded business stakeholders.

## Solution

We structured the site with clear audience paths, leading with clear value propositions for each buyer type and supporting with technical depth where appropriate.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Software Secured
projects.description: Website for a penetration testing and application security company.
projects.summary: Website design for Software Secured — a penetration testing and application security company.
projects.body:
## Overview

Software Secured is a penetration testing and application security firm helping companies find and fix vulnerabilities before attackers do.

## Challenge

Security buyers are highly sceptical and technically sophisticated. The site needed to demonstrate real expertise fast — without relying on vague promises or generic security imagery.

## Solution

We led with specifics: clear service descriptions, transparent process, and team credibility. The design was clean and direct, reflecting the precision of the work.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Rosalyn
projects.description: Website for an AI-powered online proctoring and exam integrity platform.
projects.summary: Website design for Rosalyn — an AI-powered online proctoring platform for academic and professional certification exams.
projects.body:
## Overview

Rosalyn uses AI to monitor online exams and ensure academic integrity for universities and certification bodies. The project was a website redesign to better serve their institutional buyers.

## Challenge

Online proctoring is a sensitive category — institutions need to feel confident that the technology is effective and that students will trust the process. The site needed to address both audiences.

## Solution

We built the site around trust signals and clear use cases — showing exactly how Rosalyn works for both administrators and students, with strong emphasis on reliability and fairness.

## Results

Coming soon.
